title: Generating Non-English IATs and Collecting Offline Samples
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"8ptt","text":"This protocol describes tools to: a) create non-English IATs using iatgen and R, b) build the repository of translations for iatgen, and c) deploy Qualtrics-based IATs in offline environments. Together, these functions increase the flexibility of the IAT and may help reduce the negative effects of WEIRD samples","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
creator: João Oliveira Santos
